# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_commands:
        description: 'Shell commands to run during build process'
        required: true
        type: string
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Run custom build commands
        run: |
          set -e
          ${{ inputs.build_commands }}
      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        if: success()
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: |
            **/*.log
            **/*.txt
            **/*.out
            **/*.zip
            **/*.tar.gz
            **/*.war
            **/*.jar
            **/*.exe
            **/*.msi
            **/*.app
            **/*.dmg
            **/*.deb
            **/*.rpm
            **/*.apk
            **/*.ipa
            **/*.zip
            **/*.tar
            **/*.tgz
            **/*.tbz2
            **/*.txz
            **/*.7z
            **/*.rar
            **/*.iso
            **/*.img
            **/*.bin
            **/*.hex
            **/*.elf
            **/*.o
            **/*.a
            **/*.so
            **/*.dylib
            **/*.dll
            **/*.lib
            **/*.obj
            **/*.pdb
            **/*.map
            **/*.sym
            **/*.log
            **/*.out
            **/*.tmp
            **/*.temp
            **/*.cache
            **/*.build
            **/*.dist
            **/*.release
            **/*.debug
            **/*.profile
            **/*.coverage
            **/*.test
            **/*.spec
            **/*.yaml
            **/*.yml
            **/*.json
            **/*.xml
            **/*.html
            **/*.css
            **/*.js
